sources.title: 2 Hikers Are Being Hunted By Evil | Full Movie | Survival Horror | The Retreat
sources.description:
Set in the Adirondack High Peaks of Upstate New York, two best friends. Gus and Adam, set out for a winter backpacking trip. After a horrifying encounter with a monster, Gus finds himself alone and lost. Now, he must now fight for his life while keeping his grip on reality as he's tormented both physically and psychologically by the evil Native American legend, The Wendigo.
2020.  Stars: Grant Schumacher, Dylan Grunn, Chris Cimperman

metadata.Plot: What seems to be the ideal setting for fun and relaxation quickly turns deadly when six vacationing college students encounter a cursed spirit with an insatiable appetite.
metadata.Actors: Khalilah Joi, Kerem Bürsin, Liza Burns
